name: autodl-remote
description: Bash-only SSH account, fleet, command, tmux, upload, download, job, dashboard, and shutdown tool layer for AutoDL.

interface.shortDescription: Control AutoDL over SSH from local Codex.
interface.longDescription: Provides SSH account and fleet management, remote command execution, optional tmux-backed long jobs, explicit file upload/download primitives, remote job/run tracking, read-only dashboard generation, script execution, and shutdown handling. Codex decides what to inspect, push, pull, and run.
defaultPrompt: Use AutoDL Remote to inspect my remote project.
Upload this edited file to AutoDL and run training.
Tail the latest AutoDL training log.
Run a long AutoDL training job in tmux and show the live pane output.
Check the status of my detached AutoDL job.
Show a read-only dashboard for my AutoDL devices and runs.
Shut down the remote AutoDL machine when the run is finished.
